---
id: create-campaign
title: "Create a new Merkle airdrop campaign"
description: "Creates a new Merkle airdrop campaign by:"
sidebar_label: "Create a new Merkle airdrop campaign"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api/airdrops/merkle-api/sablier-merkle-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"} children={"Create a new Merkle airdrop campaign"}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={"post"} path={"/api/create"} context={"endpoint"}></MethodEndpoint>

Creates a new Merkle airdrop campaign by:

1. Validating the CSV file and its contents
2. Adding decimal padding to every amount
3. Building the Merkle tree and generating a root hash
4. Computing intermediary data (total expected amount, number of recipients)
5. Uploading the data as a JSON file to IPFS
6. Returning the root hash, IPFS CID, and intermediary data

## Prerequisites

Before creating a campaign, you'll need:

- The decimals of the token you're basing the campaign on
- A CSV file containing [address, amount] pairs for every campaign recipient

The CSV should contain a header row, followed by address and amount pairs. Amounts should be in human-readable form—the
API handles decimal padding automatically.

<Heading id={"request"} as={"h2"} className={"openapi-tabs__heading"} children={"Request"}></Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[
    {
      name: "decimals",
      in: "query",
      required: true,
      description: "The number of decimals for the token",
      schema: { type: "integer", minimum: 0, maximum: 77, example: 18 },
    },
  ]}
></ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{
    required: true,
    content: {
      "multipart/form-data": {
        schema: {
          type: "object",
          required: ["data"],
          properties: {
            data: { type: "string", format: "binary", description: "CSV file containing [address, amount] pairs" },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  }}
></RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{
    "200": {
      description: "Campaign created successfully",
      content: {
        "application/json": {
          schema: {
            type: "object",
            required: ["cid", "recipients", "root", "status", "total"],
            properties: {
              cid: {
                type: "string",
                description: "IPFS content identifier for the uploaded file",
                example: "QmYwAPJzv5CZsnA625s3Xf2nemtYgPpHdWEz79ojWnPbdG",
              },
              recipients: { type: "string", description: "Expected number of recipients", example: "1000" },
              root: {
                type: "string",
                description: "HEX root of the Merkle tree",
                pattern: "^0x[a-fA-F0-9]{64}$",
                example: "0x1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef",
              },
              status: { type: "string", description: "Humanized status", example: "success" },
              total: {
                type: "string",
                description: "Expected amount of assets required by the campaign",
                example: "1000000000000000000000",
              },
            },
            title: "CreateResponse",
          },
        },
      },
    },
    "400": {
      description: "Invalid request (e.g., invalid CSV format, invalid decimals)",
      content: {
        "application/json": {
          schema: {
            type: "object",
            required: ["error"],
            properties: {
              error: {
                type: "string",
                description: "Error message describing what went wrong",
                example: "Invalid address format",
              },
            },
            title: "Error",
          },
        },
      },
    },
    "500": {
      description: "Internal server error",
      content: {
        "application/json": {
          schema: {
            type: "object",
            required: ["error"],
            properties: {
              error: {
                type: "string",
                description: "Error message describing what went wrong",
                example: "Invalid address format",
              },
            },
            title: "Error",
          },
        },
      },
    },
  }}
></StatusCodes>
